description: Returns a paginated list of articles, optionally filtered by type and language.

limit.description: Maximum number of articles to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous response.

languages.description: Filter articles by ISO 639-1 language codes.

output.description: Paginated list of article summaries with a cursor for the next page.

fields.nextCursor: string|null — cursor to pass as cursor for the next page, null when no more pages

notes: Article object fields: _id, title, content, author (userId), publishedAt, createdAt, language, category. The my and subscriptions types require an authenticated session; unauthenticated requests may return empty results for those types.
